title: Rename device - new name in FMD
scenario: Renaming a device in Poly Studio Mobile app Settings does not update the device name in the Poly Find My Device list
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure your Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, tap on the 'Rename' option (or navigate to Settings > Rename).
5. Enter a new name for the device and confirm/save the change.
6. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Open the Poly Find My Device (FMD) app or feature.
8. Locate your device in the FMD list.
9. Observe the device name displayed in the FMD list.
expected: The device name displayed in the Poly Find My Device (FMD) list should show the new name that was set in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
